name: motion-contact-sheet
description: Give a coding agent eyes for motion: capture a UI animation as a timed burst and tile it into one labeled contact sheet a vision model can read.
author: Kallin Nagelberg

scripts.example: node scripts/capture.mjs --url file://$PWD/demo/index.html --play "window.play()" --clip .stage --count 48 --interval 60 --slowdown 6 --out examples/frames && node scripts/build-sheet.mjs examples/frames --select 12 --out examples/contact-sheet.png
